creator: ruben@verweg.com
text:
On 26 May 2009, at 5:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/linux-megacli,
>
> Please note that PR ports/134945 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134945

attend to this coming weekend, incorporating other input and look for  
a possible upgrade available at LSI

>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Regards,
	Ruben
